overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking along a stormy coastal path. The journey begins on a wooden dock, continues along cliffside trails, passes a rustic hut with a lighthouse, and proceeds along windswept ridges during a heavy storm at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over stormy water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside the stormy sea

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock surface
simple wooden post railing along the dock edge
dark churning water with heavy rain falling
storm clouds covering the sky with rain visible

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over a stormy sea. Heavy rain falls from dark clouds as the character moves forward on the weathered planks, with simple wooden railings visible to the left.

events.description: steps off the wooden dock onto a dirt trail along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path with stone walls appearing on the left side

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding along the cliffside
low stone wall running parallel to the path
grassy hillside terrain alongside the path
solitary wind-twisted tree on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the character transitions onto a dirt trail hugging the cliffside. A low stone wall appears on the left while the stormy sea now stretches to the right. The path winds through moderate vegetation with a twisted tree visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal settlement with wooden hut and lighthouse

events.description: lighthouse beacon becomes visible glowing on the hilltop behind the hut

agents.ego_description: approaching a rustic wooden hut with a lighthouse visible on the hill behind it

entered.detail: rustic wooden hut with thatched roof on the hillside
tall stone lighthouse with glowing beacon on top
rough stone fence lining the path
broken wooden fence or barricade beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small coastal settlement featuring a rustic wooden hut. Behind the hut, a lighthouse tower rises on the hilltop with its beacon glowing through the storm. Stone fences and wooden barricades line the muddy path as the character draws closer to the buildings.

events.description: passes the wooden hut and continues along the open windswept ridge

agents.ego_description: walking away from the settlement along the exposed coastal ridge

entered.detail: ruined stone structures visible on the distant coastline
rocky outcroppings along the stormy shoreline

segments.scene_description: Having passed the settlement, the character continues along the exposed coastal ridge. The wooden hut and lighthouse fall behind as the path opens up to reveal distant ruins and rocky outcroppings along the storm-battered shoreline. The terrain becomes more sparse as the journey continues into the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a storm-battered coastline that transitions from a narrow pier to an exposed mountain ridge. It begins with the character walking along a weathered wooden dock over a churning sea under heavy rain and dark clouds. As the character leaves the planks behind, the scene shifts to a winding dirt trail hugging the cliffside, where a low stone wall separates the path from the crashing waves. The journey then leads toward a small coastal settlement, passing a rustic wooden hut and a glowing lighthouse tower that pierces through the storm. Finally, the path opens up as the character moves past the buildings and onto a sparse, rocky ridge, leaving the settlement behind to reveal distant ruins along the desolate shoreline.
